title: Supply Chain Manager - Container Corporation of India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Container Corporation of India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the Container Corporation of India family as a Supply Chain Manager in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Container Corporation of India:
Container Corporation of India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Container Corporation of India!
